name: Samsara, Dragon of Rebirth
effectText:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY, or if this card you control is sent to your GY by an opponent's card effect: You can target 1 monster in either GY, except "Samsara, Dragon of Rebirth"; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Samsara, Dragon of Rebirth" once per turn.
